name: 4pc Bath Coordinate Set Marble - Threshold™
description:
Fill your daily routine with contemporary style with the 4pc Bath Coordinate Set Marble from Threshold™. This bathroom coordinate set includes a soap dish, a toothbrush holder with three-way partitioning, a lidded bath canister and a soap/lotion dispenser to bring organization to your space. Each piece in this bathroom accessories set is made from white marble to add visual interest to your bathroom counter.

If you’re not satisfied with any Target Owned Brand item, return it within one year with a receipt for an exchange or a refund.

Threshold™: Casual classics for house and home.
